fields.UserOnline: Whether to show notifications for users coming online.
fields.UserOnlineOnAnotherBuild: Whether to show notifications for users coming online while they are on a different version than you.
fields.UserSociable: How to handle notifications for users turning to sociable mode.
fields.Message: How to handle notifications for messages.
fields.Invite: How to handle notifications for invites.
fields.ContactRequest: How to handle notifications for contact requests.
fields.InviteRequest: How to handle notifications for invite requests.
fields.ContactSessionStarted: How to handle notifications for contact session startings.
fields.PublicSessionStarted: How to handle notifications for public session startings.
fields.UserJoinAndLeave: How to handle notifications for users joining and leaving sessions.
fields.PermissionChanged: How to handle notifications for your permissions changing in a world.
